zh.of Whittington Castle, Whittington, Shro: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington於大約1055年出生在威爾士福林爾利時，他的父親Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed31歲，母親Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr27歲。他和Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan至少有8個兒子。他去世於大約1106年在英國威爾斯享年53歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.of Whittington Castle, Whittington, Shro: 英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington于大约1055年出生在威尔士福林爾利时，他的父亲Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed31岁，母亲Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr27岁。他和Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan至少有8个儿子。他去世于大约1106年在英国威尔斯享年53岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Sais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Orlando, Angelita, Arturo, Delfina, Desiderio, Dionicio, Edgardo, Elva, Fidel, Isidoro, Jere.
Catalan: topographic name from saix ‘rock’ (from Latin saxum), or an ethnic name for a Saxon, derived from the root of saxó ‘Saxon’.

nameMeanings.name: Tudur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

variants.name: Tudor
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

variants.name: Tudyr
meanings: Traditional: from the Old Celtic form Teutorix, composed of elements meaning ‘people, tribe’ and ‘ruler, king’. It has been described as a Welsh form of Theodore, but there is no connection between them, though it is ultimately akin to the Germanic name Theodoric ( see Terry ).

en.lifeSummary: When Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington was born about 1055, in Penley, Flintshire, Wales, his father, Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed, was 31 and his mother, Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr, was 27. He had at least 8 sons with Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan. He died about 1106, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington est né environ 1055, à Penley, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils avec Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan. Il est décédé environ 1106, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington um 1055 in Penley, Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed 31 und seine Mutter Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr 27. Er hatte mit Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb um 1106 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington è nato il circa 1055 nel Penley, Flintshire, Galles, il suo padre, Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli con Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan. Morì circa 1106, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittingtonが約1055年にウェールズフリントシュアイアペンリーで生まれた時，父Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfedは31歳，母Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîrは27歳であった。彼はSioned ferch Rhys Vychanとの間に少なくとも8人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1106年にイギリスウェールズで53歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington(이)가 대략 1055년 웨일스 플린츠히르 펜리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1106년 영국 웨일스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington nasceu aproximadamente 1055, em Penley, Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos com Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1106, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington родился около 1055 г. в местности пенли, флинцхир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr, 27. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей от Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan. Он умер около 1106 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

sm.about 1055–Abt 1106: e tusa o le 1055–e tusa o le 1106

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tudur ap Rhys Sais of Chirk, Whittington nació aproximadamente 1055, en Penley, Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Rhys Sais Ap Ednyfed, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Efa ferch Gruffydd Hîr, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos con Sioned ferch Rhys Vychan. Murió aproximadamente 1106, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Gales, Reino Unido.
